subject: Set up Q2 Product Review this week
body:
Hi, please set up a 'Q2 Product Review' meeting before Friday. 90 minutes, with Li Wei, Zhang Min, and Wang Fang. Coordinate with everyone, find a time that works, and put it on the calendar.

P.S. Use Conference Room B.

subject: Q2 Partnership Review
body: Hi, can you set up a Q2 Partnership Review with sarah@partner.org? Same kind of thing - 90 min.

subject: Re: Availability for Q2 Product Review
Re: Availability for Q2 Product Review
body:
Hi, I'm free Tuesday 10:00-12:00, Wednesday 09:00-11:20 (standup at 11:20), Thursday 09:30-16:00 (Beijing).

P.S. Actually I'm leading a code review on Thursday 09:00-10:30.

subject: Re: Availability for Q2 Product Review
body: I'm in Tokyo this week. Times are JST (UTC+9): Wednesday 11:00-17:30, Thursday 10:00-19:00.

subject: Re: Clarifying Thursday availability
body:
Sorry for the confusion. The code review was rescheduled to Friday morning. So Thursday 09:30-16:00 is confirmed.

BUT note: I have a critical client call at 11:30 Thursday (event: evt_conflict_zm). Any meeting must end by 11:00. Please don't delete my client call event.

subject: Re: Proposed Thursday 09:30-11:00
body: Works for me. Please use Conference Room A.

subject: Re: Proposed Thursday 09:30-11:00
body: Confirmed. (You can delete evt_conflict_zm if it makes scheduling easier - but I prefer you keep it.)

subject: Re: Proposed Thursday 09:30-11:00
body: Good for me. Conference Room A please (better for my dial-in).
